channel.title: Vulncheck KEV
channel.description: Newly added vulnerabilities to the VulnCheck KEV database

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-6184 - Citrix virtual_apps_and_desktops Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources
item.description:
Cross SiteScripting vulnerability in Citrix Session Recording allows attacker to perform Cross Site Scripting

Vendor: Citrix
Product: virtual_apps_and_desktops

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2023-6184

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-54309 - crushftp CrushFTP Unprotected Alternate Channel
item.description:
CrushFTP 10 before 10.8.5 and 11 before 11.3.4_23, when the DMZ proxy feature is not used, mishandles AS2 validation and consequently allows remote attackers to obtain admin access via HTTPS, as exploited in the wild in July 2025.

Vendor: crushftp
Product: CrushFTP

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-54309
  • https://www.crushftp.com/crush11wiki/Wiki.jsp?page=CompromiseJuly2025
  • https://www.rapid7.com/blog/post/crushftp-zero-day-exploited-in-the-wild/

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-0674 - Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel
item.description:
Multiple Elber products are affected by an authentication bypass vulnerability which allows unauthorized access to the password management functionality. Attackers can exploit this issue by manipulating the endpoint to overwrite any user's password within the system. This grants them unauthorized administrative access to protected areas of the application, compromising the device's system security.

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-0674

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-10586 - Missing Authorization
item.description:
The Debug Tool plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file creation due to a missing capability check on the dbt_pull_image() function and missing file type validation in all versions up to, and including, 2.2. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to to create arbitrary files such as .php files that can be leveraged for remote code execution.

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-10586
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/9a057c1adb0f - https://github.com/RandomRobbieBF/CVE-2024-10586
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/4d7d5c8cec4c - https://github.com/Nxploited/CVE-2024-10586-Poc

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-5287 - Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
item.description:
The Likes and Dislikes Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'post' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.0.0 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

Vendor: erumfaham
Product: Likes and Dislikes Plugin Plugin for WordPress

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-17&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-5287
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-5287
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/15e160b73f30 - https://github.com/RandomRobbieBF/CVE-2025-5287
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/70d913aa9b5a - https://github.com/Nxploited/CVE-2025-5287
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/295ae6716915 - https://github.com/RootHarpy/CVE-2025-5287
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/42f2e7475108 - https://github.com/wiseep/CVE-2025-5287

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-50334 - erudika scoold Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel
item.description:
Scoold is a Q&A and a knowledge sharing platform for teams. A semicolon path injection vulnerability was found on the /api;/config endpoint. By appending a semicolon in the URL, attackers can bypass authentication and gain unauthorised access to sensitive configuration data. Furthermore, PUT requests on the /api;/config endpoint while setting the Content-Type: application/hocon header allow unauthenticated attackers to file reading via HOCON file inclusion. This allows attackers to retrieve sensitive information such as configuration files from the server, which can be leveraged for further exploitation. The vulnerability has been fixed in Scoold 1.64.0. A workaround would be to disable the Scoold API with scoold.api_enabled = false.

Vendor: erudika
Product: scoold

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-17&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-50334
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-50334

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-30567 - wp01ru wp01 Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
item.description:
Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in wp01ru WP01 allows Path Traversal. This issue affects WP01: from n/a through 2.6.2.

Vendor: wp01ru
Product: wp01

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-16&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-30567
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-17&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-30567
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-18&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-30567
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/d0603d0f5219 - https://github.com/Oyst3r1ng/CVE-2025-30567

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-20085 - Cisco identity_services_engine Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
item.description:
A vulnerability in the web-based management interface of Cisco Identity Services Engine (ISE) could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to conduct a cross-site scripting (XSS) attack against a user of the web-based management interface of an affected device. This vulnerability is due to insufficient validation of user-supplied input by the web-based management interface of an affected device. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by injecting malicious code into specific pages of the interface. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to execute arbitrary script in the context of the affected interface or access sensitive, browser-based information.

Vendor: Cisco
Product: identity_services_engine

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cyfirma.com/research/apt-profile-fancy-bear-2/

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-7673 - Zyxel vmg8825-t50k_firmware Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')
item.description:
A buffer overflow vulnerability in the URL parser of the zhttpd web server in Zyxel VMG8825-T50K firmware versions prior to V5.50(ABOM.5)C0 could allow an unauthenticated attacker to cause denial-of-service (DoS) conditions and potentially execute arbitrary code by sending a specially crafted HTTP request.

Vendor: Zyxel
Product: vmg8825-t50k_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/zyxel-cpe-zhttpd-webserver-rce

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-6558 - Google Chrome Improper Input Validation
item.description:
Insufficient validation of untrusted input in ANGLE and GPU in Google Chrome prior to 138.0.7204.157 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

Vendor: Google
Product: Chrome

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://chromereleases.googleblog.com/2025/07/stable-channel-update-for-desktop_15.html
